# Generated by tools/m7_war.py --write; M7 ancient unit roster.
# Vanilla unit and levy unlocks are pruned in the matching advance overrides.
antq_legionaries = {
	is_special = yes
	copy_from = a_age_1_traditions_heavy_infantry
	hide = no
	buildable = yes
	age = age_1_traditions
	strength_damage_taken = -0.08
	morale_damage_taken = -0.05
	initiative = -0.25
	combat = { hills = -0.05 }
	country_potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = XAA
		}
	}
	gfx_tags = { legionary_tag sword_tag heavy_tag }
	# P14;CAH-XI; Professional Roman heavy infantry; the numerical profile is a bounded technical role adapter
}

antq_auxilia = {
	is_special = yes
	copy_from = a_age_1_traditions_light_infantry
	hide = no
	buildable = no
	levy = yes
	age = age_1_traditions
	movement_speed = 0.15
	morale_damage_done = 0.05
	combat = { forest = 0.10 hills = 0.05 }
	country_potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = XAA
		}
	}
	gfx_tags = { archer_tag light_tag }
	# P14;CAH-XI; Roman levy-analog with an explicitly non-mechanical citizenship-on-discharge flavor
}

antq_thureophoroi = {
	is_special = yes
	copy_from = a_age_1_traditions_light_infantry
	hide = no
	buildable = yes
	age = age_1_traditions
	initiative = 0.25
	morale_damage_done = 0.05
	combat = { hills = 0.05 }
	country_potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = CLZ
			has_or_had_tag = XAF
			has_or_had_tag = XAO
			has_or_had_tag = CAP
			has_or_had_tag = XAE
			has_or_had_tag = EME
		}
	}
	gfx_tags = { light_tag sword_tag }
	# P14;CAH-XI; Hellenistic flexible-infantry adapter; regional availability is deliberately bounded
}

antq_hellenistic_phalanx = {
	is_special = yes
	copy_from = a_age_1_traditions_heavy_infantry
	hide = no
	buildable = yes
	age = age_1_traditions
	combat_speed = -0.20
	morale_damage_done = 0.10
	combat = { hills = -0.10 forest = -0.10 }
	country_potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = XAF
			has_or_had_tag = CLZ
		}
	}
	gfx_tags = { heavy_tag sword_tag }
	# P14;CAH-XI; Remnant phalanx adapter for the Black Sea Hellenistic courts rather than a universal classical unit
}

antq_warbands = {
	is_special = yes

			has_or_had_tag = XBQ

			has_or_had_tag = JUT
			has_or_had_tag = XDK
			has_or_had_tag = XBV
			has_or_had_tag = XBW
			has_or_had_tag = XBX
			has_or_had_tag = XBY
			has_or_had_tag = XBZ
			has_or_had_tag = XCA
			has_or_had_tag = XCB
			has_or_had_tag = DUM
			has_or_had_tag = CAL
			has_or_had_tag = XCC
			has_or_had_tag = XDJ
		}
	}
	gfx_tags = { medium_tag sword_tag }
	# P14;CAH-XI; Germanic Celtic and Brittonic levy-warband adapter; it does not claim a uniform tactical doctrine
}

	buildable = yes

	# P14;BHR;CAH-XI; Western Han regular crossbow-infantry edge represented without inventing a specific unit establishment
}

}

	is_special = yes

}

antq_balearic_slingers = {
	is_special = yes
	copy_from = a_age_1_traditions_light_infantry
	hide = no
	buildable = no
	mercenaries_per_location = { pop_type = peasants multiply = 0.01 }
	age = age_1_traditions

	morale_damage_done = 0.10
	combat = { hills = 0.05 }
	country_potential = {

			has_or_had_tag = XAG
		}
	}
	gfx_tags = { light_tag }
	# P14;CAH-XI; Era mercenary company adapter; availability is not a claim of permanent island sovereignty
}

	is_special = yes
	copy_from = n_age_1_traditions_galley
	hide = no
	buildable = yes
	age = age_1_traditions
	cannons = 0
	movement_speed = 0.50
	hull_size = -2

		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = XAA
		}
	}
	gfx_tags = { mediterranean_galley_tag }
	# P14;CAH-XI; Light Roman galley with explicitly zero gunpowder armament
}

	is_special = yes
	copy_from = n_age_1_traditions_transport
	hide = no
	buildable = yes
	age = age_1_traditions
	cannons = 0
	transport_capacity = 0.35
	hull_size = -2
	country_potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = XAA
			has_or_had_tag = XAH
			has_or_had_tag = XAR
			has_or_had_tag = SAT
			has_or_had_tag = XBB
		}
	}
	# P14;CAH-XI; Ancient merchant carrier adapter; it is not an ocean-crossing early-modern class
}

	is_special = yes
	copy_from = n_age_1_traditions_light_ship
	hide = no
	buildable = yes
	age = age_1_traditions
	cannons = 0
	movement_speed = 0.50
	hull_size = -2
	country_potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = SAT
			has_or_had_tag = XBB
			has_or_had_tag = XBI
			has_or_had_tag = HIM
			has_or_had_tag = QAT
			has_or_had_tag = XBJ
			has_or_had_tag = XDF
		}
	}
	# P14;PER;CAH-XI; Indian-Ocean coastal and monsoon vessel adapter with explicitly zero gunpowder armament
}

antq_austronesian_outrigger = {
	is_special = yes
	copy_from = n_age_1_traditions_transport
	hide = no
	buildable = no
	levy = yes
	age = age_1_traditions
	cannons = 0
	movement_speed = 0.75
	hull_size = -5
	transport_capacity = -0.10
	country_potential = {
		OR = {
			has_or_had_tag = XCM
			has_or_had_tag = JAV
			has_or_had_tag = PHL
			has_or_had_tag = XCN
			has_or_had_tag = XCO
			has_or_had_tag = MEL
			has_or_had_tag = XDS
		}
	}
	# P14;CAH-XI; Austronesian small-vessel adapter; no trans-Pacific discovery or oceanic class is implied
}
